data.keyword: Does Louisville Mental Health Group offer therapy in Louisville KY?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode Does Louisville Mental Health Group offer therapy in Louisville KY?

result.keyword: Does Louisville Mental Health Group offer therapy in Louisville KY?

items.markdown:
`Yes, Louisville Mental Health Group offers therapy in Louisville, KY.` [[1]](https://louisvilleaddictioncenter.com/services/louisville-mental-health/)[[2]](https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/therapists/louisville-mental-health-group-louisville-ky/1309075)

- **Services:** They offer a variety of services, including individual therapy, group therapy, and in-office therapy sessions, with Denise Myers, M.Ed. LPP , and Jim Walker, LCSW , according to local listings.
- **Specialties:** They address issues such as anxiety, ADHD, low self-esteem, depression, and adjustment difficulties.
- **Location:** They have a physical office in Louisville, Kentucky.[[1]](https://app.squareup.com/appointments/book/eb9c5ddf-fbb9-40ae-8d73-967aad8c9082/NB6KRWR5H44BZ/start?service_id=5NHEWSNEQSS6BKWMP52YM76F&variation_id=XK5C5ZLR3STU22UFBV2L24QX)[[2]](https://jimwalker.fullslate.com/services/5)[[3]](https://paintedgroverecovery.com/therapy-programs/group-therapy/)[[4]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/)[[5]](https://www.flourishlouisville.com/)

Would you like me to find out if they **accept your insurance**?
